title: K + R vs K
summary: Drive the king to the edge and deliver mate

steps.title: The Technique
steps.text: King and rook vs. king is always a win for the stronger side. The technique: use the rook to cut off the enemy king, then walk your king up alongside to drive him to the edge. Finally, deliver mate on the back rank.

steps.title: The Mating Net
steps.text: When the enemy king is pinned to the edge and the opposing king stops any escape, your rook slides in for mate. The pattern is this — memorize it.

steps.hint: The king's own pawn is his prison wall.
